subject: a hulking, mossy troll seated and feasting amid a forested landscape, holding a haunch of meat
description: A massive, lichen-covered troll dominates the frame, hunched over and tearing into a chunk of food held in one oversized clawed hand. Its skin is a mottled green-brown crust with stony, bark-like texture, and tusks jut from its lower jaw. The figure is set in a deep forest of muted greens with diffuse, overcast light filtering through trees. Scattered around the troll are bones, gnawed remnants, and what appear to be small woodland critters or food scraps, suggesting an extended meal. Composition is mid-to-wide with the troll rendered as a brutish silhouette against the woodland background.
foreground: seated troll feasting on meat amid bones and scraps
background: dense forest with muted overcast light
